zh.Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭斯林史爾班諾可本
zh.Stapleton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯塔普萊頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gilbert Stapleton於大約1290年出生在英國越可爾貝達爾時，他的父親Sir Miles Stapleton I29歲，母親Sibyl Bellew22歲。他於大約1314年與Agnes FitzAlan結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1321年在他的家鄉享年33歲。

zh-hans.Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 苏格兰斯林史爾班諾可本
zh-hans.Stapleton, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯塔普萊頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gilbert Stapleton于大约1290年出生在英国越可爾貝達爾时，他的父亲Sir Miles Stapleton I29岁，母亲Sibyl Bellew22岁。他于大约1314年与Agnes FitzAlan结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1321年在他的家乡享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gilbert Stapleton was born about 1290, in Bedale, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Miles Stapleton I, was 29 and his mother, Sibyl Bellew, was 22. He married Agnes FitzAlan about 1314. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1321, in his hometown, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gilbert Stapleton est né environ 1290, à Bedale, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Miles Stapleton I, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Bellew, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Agnes FitzAlan environ 1314. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1321, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gilbert Stapleton um 1290 in Bedale, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Miles Stapleton I 29 und seine Mutter Sibyl Bellew 22. Er hat um 1314 Agnes FitzAlan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1321 im Alter von 33 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert Stapleton è nato il circa 1290 nel Bedale, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Miles Stapleton I, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Sibyl Bellew, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Agnes FitzAlan circa 1314. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1321, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland: スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアバノクブルン

ja.Stapleton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスタプレトン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert Stapletonが約1290年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベダルで生まれた時，父Sir Miles Stapleton Iは29歳，母Sibyl Bellewは22歳であった。約1314年にAgnes FitzAlanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1321年に故郷で33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert Stapleton(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 요르크실르 베데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Miles Stapleton I(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl Bellew(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1314년 Agnes FitzAlan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1321년 그의 고향에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1290–about 1321: tany ho any amin'ny 1290–tany ho any amin'ny 1321

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert Stapleton nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Miles Stapleton I, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl Bellew, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes FitzAlan aproximadamente 1314. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1321, em sua cidade natal, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gilbert Stapleton родился около 1290 г. в местности бедеил, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Miles Stapleton I было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Bellew, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes FitzAlan около 1314 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1321 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 33 лет.

sm.about 1290–about 1321: e tusa o le 1290–e tusa o le 1321

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gilbert Stapleton nació aproximadamente 1290, en Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Miles Stapleton I, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Sibyl Bellew, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Agnes FitzAlan aproximadamente 1314. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1321, en su pueblo, a la edad de 33 años.
